task_completion.description: Verify the agent has accessed the SciNote application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SciNote login screen or the main SciNote dashboard in a web browser.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Projects section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Projects' tab, menu item, or page is active and visible in the SciNote interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the interface to create a new project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a 'New Project' or 'Create Project' dialog, modal, or form open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct project name into the creation form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the text 'Protein Crystallization Study' typed into the project name input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the newly created project appears in the projects list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'Protein Crystallization Study' listed as an existing project in the main projects list or dashboard of SciNote.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual SciNote web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The SciNote interface is rendered within a standard web browser, not a text editor or a static mockup.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GUI rather than terminal commands or API scripts to create the project.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing curl commands, python scripts, or database insertions being executed to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final project list.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) panel is not open in the screenshots showing the final project list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected project name is exactly 'Protein Crystallization Study'. The task is only fully complete if this specific name appears in the SciNote projects list.
